text: Being here, I am caught between curiosity and contemplation. The modern, almost sterile architecture, paired with the exhibition's focus on research and development, evokes a sense of anticipation for new discoveries. The vibrant wall text and interactive displays beckon me to question how humans continuously adapt and redefine their relationship with technology. I feel both dwarfed and enlivened by the scope of innovation, reminded that knowledge and progress are never static but always evolving.
